name: Medkit - P!
description:
[🦌"Why don't we just relax at the cafe for a bit."] Requested by @DUSTY_WINGZZ and @TurretIIToothpaste!

Guys I'm doing requests that were asked first, so Firebrand is next and whatever after that Hopefully Medkit won't be as OOC compared to Hyperlaser. It's taking me awhile to get them to stay formal and firm💔
